settings.heading: Order Processing
settings.body:
• Orders are processed within 5-8 business days.
  • Orders placed on weekends or public holidays will be processed on the next business day.

settings.heading: Shipping Times
settings.body: Delivery times vary depending on your location and the shipping method selected during checkout.

settings.heading: Order Tracking
settings.body: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking information.

settings.heading: International Shipping
settings.body:
International shipping is available for selected destinations. Shipping charges and delivery times vary by country.

Please note that customs duties, taxes, and import fees are the responsibility of the customer where applicable.

settings.heading: Shipping Information
settings.intro: We strive to process and dispatch all orders as quickly as possible.
